ddls:
CREATE TABLE "papers" (
  "paper_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each paper */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the paper */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the paper */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the paper */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "cited_url" TEXT /* URL of the citation */,
  "cited_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the paper has been cited */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the publication */,
  "issue" INTEGER /* Issue of the publication */,
  "pages" TEXT /* Page range of the publication */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the paper */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., article, book, conference paper) */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the paper */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("paper_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "orcid" TEXT /* ORCID of the author */,
  "researcher_id" TEXT /* Researcher ID of the author */,
  "institutional_id" TEXT /* Institutional ID of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "author_paper" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  "paper_id" INTEGER /* ID of the paper */,
  "author_sequence" INTEGER /* Sequence of the author in the paper */,
  "author_role" TEXT /* Role of the author in the paper (e.g., lead author, corresponding author) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id", "paper_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "platforms" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each platform */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the platform */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the platform */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the platform */,
  "issn" TEXT /* ISSN of the platform */,
  "eissn" TEXT /* eISSN of the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "paper_platform" (
  "paper_id" INTEGER /* ID of the paper */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* ID of the platform */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication on the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("paper_id", "platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "citations" (
  "citation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each citation */,
  "paper_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cited paper */,
  "citing_paper_id" INTEGER /* ID of the citing paper */,
  "citing_author" TEXT /* Name of the citing author */,
  "citation_date" TEXT /* Date of citation */,
  "citation_source" TEXT /* Source of the citation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("citation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_paper_id FOREIGN KEY ("paper_id") REFERENCES papers ("paper_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_citing_paper_id FOREIGN KEY ("citing_paper_id") REFERENCES papers ("paper_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "references" (
  "reference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reference */,
  "paper_id" INTEGER /* ID of the paper */,
  "reference_type" TEXT /* Type of reference (e.g., book, article, conference paper) */,
  "reference_text" TEXT /* Text of the reference */,
  "reference_url" TEXT /* URL of the reference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_references_paper_id FOREIGN KEY ("paper_id") REFERENCES papers ("paper_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the institution */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "author_institution" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution */,
  "affiliation_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the affiliation */,
  "affiliation_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the affiliation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id", "institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "paper_topics" (
  "paper_id" INTEGER /* ID of the paper */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("paper_id", "topic_id")
)
column_names: Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the paper
Number of times the paper has been cited
Type of document (e.g., article, book, conference paper)
Sequence of the author in the paper
Role of the author in the paper (e.g., lead author, corresponding author)
Date of publication on the platform
Type of reference (e.g., book, article, conference paper)
